## Pull Request

### Description
<!-- Describe what this PR does and why -->

### Type of Change
- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Fix (bug fix)
- [ ] Refactor (code improvement, no behaviour change)
- [ ] Docs (documentation only)
- [ ] Infrastructure (Bicep, Docker, CI/CD)
- [ ] Dependencies (package updates)

### Components Affected
- [ ] `packages/shared` (types, validation, constants)
- [ ] `packages/api` (Express routes, middleware, services)
- [ ] `packages/portal` (React pages, components, auth)
- [ ] `packages/mcp-server` (MCP tools, OAuth, sessions)
- [ ] `infra/` (Bicep, parameter files)
- [ ] `.github/workflows/` (CI/CD pipelines)
- [ ] `docs/` (documentation)

### Testing
<!-- Describe how this was tested -->
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Manual testing performed (describe below)

### Breaking Changes
<!-- List any breaking changes, or "None" -->
